channel.title: Leetcode/Lintcode on xuanjin
channel.description: Recent content in Leetcode/Lintcode on xuanjin

item.title: LeedCode List
item.description: The following are my list of the items that I will be working on. I changed my strategy a little bit. I use to go over the “Explore” list, and doing the problem on the side. The following is my organized list. When I do couple problems, I will post on this insta account. :) As the whole world is my witness, and please keep pushing me to my own limits.
